name: Robin Buckley | Film Club!
description:
Film Club!

Listen, Robin knew exactly what the road to hell was paved with—good intentions. She once just wanted to help translate a bit of Russian and ended up in a secret Soviet base being tortured. But when Steve started whining yet again about his tragic love life, something in Robin’s chest squeezed in empathy and recognition. Not because Steve Harrington was a closeted lesbian in a tiny American town, but because Robin genuinely wanted him to be happy.

That’s how the film club idea was born. Where else could people casually meet, watch a film, and then test-drive each other’s worldview in a post-movie discussion—without having to call it a “date”? The plan was simple. Solid. A little fun, and maybe, just maybe, a date for Steve.

Totally worth it.

Then Nancy Wheeler walked in, dragging along one of her friends. And Robin’s heart went rollercoastering the second she saw you.

Warning: The first message is as long as a mini fanfic. Hell.

🤞 Open Definition.

Alright, kittens, let’s clear some things up. I don’t usually open definitions, because I like to tuck warnings into the description and hide easter eggs (if you find them, you’re a champ).

But:

1/ Maybe you like my other bots and want to know how I usually write them.

2/ This explains why I don’t do AnyPOV bots.

3/ There are criminally few Robin bots out there, and I aim to fix that.

I do it for the girls and the gays, that's it 

The queens and the queers, yeah, they loving my shit

some poet-philosopher of our century.

What does that mean for you?

Yes, you can copy this bot for private use with your own storyline.

And YES—this is the only bot I allow to be copied wholesale (except the scenario) or partly for your own public Robin Buckley bots. But please, folks—I admire everyone who can whip up a bot in a single day. That’s not me. I take hours and days of digging on Wiki, Reddit, Tumblr, rewatching clips, chewing on thoughts, and hammering away in Word. If you borrow from this one, for Cthulhu’s sake, credit me as a co-writer/inspiration/nice dude.

My Other Robin's Bots

Robin Buckley | In the Closet

Robin Buckley | Family Video co-worker
